startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Public offer pages to crawl (scheduled ingestion, not per-transaction)

crawlerMode.title: Crawler Mode
crawlerMode.description: auto = Cheerio first, Playwright retry on JS shells

dryRun.title: Dry Run
dryRun.description: Parse and log without writing dataset

saveSnapshots.title: Save Snapshots
saveSnapshots.description: Save KV snapshots when zero offers or in debug

debugUrl.title: Debug URL
debugUrl.description: Single URL test (overrides startUrls and skips discovery)

allowedDomains.title: Allowed Domains
allowedDomains.description: Applied to discovery filtering and crawl enqueue

denyPatterns.title: Deny Patterns
denyPatterns.description: Regex patterns — matching URLs are not crawled

discoveryEnabled.title: Discovery Enabled
discoveryEnabled.description: Run Google SERP discovery before crawl (scheduled ingestion only)

discoveryQueries.title: Discovery Queries
discoveryQueries.description: Google search queries for public offer URL discovery

discoveryMaxResults.title: Discovery Max Results
discoveryMaxResults.description: Max organic results per query per page

discoveryPages.title: Discovery Pages
discoveryPages.description: Google SERP pages to fetch per query (pagination)
